untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'bear power' and 'bull power' indicators which are not in the allowed indicator list. These are Elder-Ray indicators (close - 13-day EMA for bear power, 13-day EMA - low for bull power) that must be calculated separately or added to the indicator library. Signal also requires detection of 'bullish divergence' which requires pattern recognition beyond simple threshold comparisons.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used uptrend confirmation (close > sma_50) and rising price (close > prev_close) as approximation of 'major trend up' and 'bear power rising'. The optional filters for bull power peaks and bearish divergence cannot be translated without access to Elder-Ray indicators. Recommend adding bear_power and bull_power to the indicator library to fully implement this signal.
